meaning: International Atomic Energy Agency,国际原子能组织
examples: That will be news to IAEA inspectors.
That is why the IAEA is there [to investigate].
IAEA figures also showed the refining was less productive.
The BBC's Bethany Bell, in Vienna, has examined the IAEA's latest quarterly report on Iran's nuclear programme.
Japanese authorities said they had measured radiation dose rates of up to 400 millisieverts-per-hour, IAEA reported.
